headline: CRM Paid Holders $63 Billion While The Stock Went Nowhere
summary: The software giant showered owners with cash while the stock price sank. Here's the real accounting of what investors got, and what they're betting on now.

headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Could Be 14% Above Fair Value After Its $1b Note Exchange
summary: Why S&P Global’s Exchange Offer Matters for Stock Investors S&P Global (SPGI) has launched a fixed income exchange offer involving US$1 billion of existing notes, a move that puts the company’s capital structure and funding costs in focus for equity investors. The offer covers US$600 million of 4.250% notes due January 15, 2031 and US$400 million of 4.800% notes due December 4, 2035. Both are unsecured, unsubordinated and carry attached guarantees. See our latest analysis for S&P...

headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Launches AI Data Service And Pantera Backed Digital Asset Index
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) launched its AI-powered Adaptive Retrieval data service, allowing clients to access and assemble licensed data using natural language queries for a range of AI workflows. The company also introduced the S&P Pantera Digital Asset Index in partnership with Pantera Capital, expanding its offerings in digital asset data and indexing. S&P Global enters these product launches with its shares at $431.26 and a mixed recent track record, with the stock down 15.9% year to date...
